zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger De Montgomery I於大約0985年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，他的父親De MONTGOMERY31歲，母親Sibell De Crepon13歲。他於大約1010年與Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1056年2月7日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年72歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯特洛阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger De Montgomery I于大约0985年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯时，他的父亲De MONTGOMERY31岁，母亲Sibell De Crepon13岁。他于大约1010年与Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1056年2月7日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年72岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯特洛阿。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger De Montgomery I was born about 0985, in Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, his father, De MONTGOMERY, was 31 and his mother, Sibell De Crepon, was 13. He married Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer about 1010, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 7 February 1056, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in Troarn, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger De Montgomery I est né environ 0985, à Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, De MONTGOMERY, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sibell De Crepon, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer environ 1010, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 7 février 1056, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Troarn, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger De Montgomery I um 0985 in Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater De MONTGOMERY 31 und seine Mutter Sibell De Crepon 13. Er hat um 1010 in Normandie, Frankreich Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 7. Februar 1056 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Troarn, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Montgomery I è nato il circa 0985 nel Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, De MONTGOMERY, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sibell De Crepon, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer circa 1010, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 7 febbraio 1056, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Troarn, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Montgomery Iが約0985年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父De MONTGOMERYは31歳，母Sibell De Creponは13歳であった。約1010年にフランスノーマンディでJosceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1056年2月7日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで72歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドストロアルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Montgomery I(이)가 대략 0985년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 De MONTGOMERY(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibell De Crepon(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1010년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1056년 2월 7일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 트로른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Montgomery I nasceu aproximadamente 0985, em Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, De MONTGOMERY, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sibell De Crepon, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer aproximadamente 1010, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1056, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Troarn, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger De Montgomery I родился около 0985 г. в местности калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени De MONTGOMERY было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sibell De Crepon, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer около 1010 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 7 февраля 1056 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности троарн, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger De Montgomery I nació aproximadamente 0985, en Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, De MONTGOMERY, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sibell De Crepon, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Josceline Torfulus de Pont-Audemer aproximadamente 1010, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1056, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Troarn, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
